TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_dungec, title = dungec, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/dungec} }

S.FORM: == dungec == i teban nu kaway nu lemangaway, mangazuay a heci. taneng mukan, asu' mukan. u zuma a dungec dungec nu uway и—Өеҝғ dungec nu tebus з”ҳи”—еҝғ dungec nu buksu зү§иҚүеҝғ dungec nu da'dac жӘіжҰ”еҝғ dungec nu lucik иҠ’иҚүеҝғ
S.PHON: == duЕӢЙҷКҰ == i tЙҷban nu kawaj nu r~ЙҫЙҷmaЕӢawaj, maЕӢazuaj a Д§ЙҷКҰi. tanЙҷЕӢ mukan, asuК”~КЎ mukan. u zuma a duЕӢЙҷКҰ duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu uwaj ** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu tЙҷbus *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu buksu *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu daК”~КЎdaКҰ *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu r~ЙҫuКҰik ***
S.FORM: == dungec == i teban nu kaway nu lemangaway, mangazuay a heci. taneng mukan, asu' mukan. u zuma a dungec dungec nu uway и—Өеҝғ dungec nu tebus з”ҳи”—еҝғ dungec nu buksu зү§иҚүеҝғ dungec nu da'dac жӘіжҰ”еҝғ dungec nu lucik иҠ’иҚүеҝғ
S.PHON: == duЕӢЙҷКҰ == i tЙҷban nu kawaj nu r~ЙҫЙҷmaЕӢawaj, maЕӢazuaj a Д§ЙҷКҰi. tanЙҷЕӢ mukan, asuК”~КЎ mukan. u zuma a duЕӢЙҷКҰ duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu uwaj ** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu tЙҷbus *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu buksu *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu daК”~КЎdaКҰ *** duЕӢЙҷКҰ nu r~ЙҫuКҰik ***
